backend/main.mo: Motoko canister managing games and Match Word to Image questions with CRUD operations and in‑memory Maps/Lists.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report linking a UI update to the MatchWordToImageGame component.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Prewritten summaries of major frontend files for reference and build planning.
frontend/index.css: Global Tailwind-based theme defining OKLCH color variables and dark mode overrides.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router routes for home, manager, and game launch pages within AppLayout.
frontend/src/components/AppLayout.tsx: Layout wrapper with header navigation, footer, and route outlet.
frontend/src/components/ChooseCorrectIma: Gameplay component for Choose Correct Image with shuffled questions, image selection feedback, retries, and progression.
Dialog for creating a choose-correct-image question with a word, exactly three uploaded images, and a selected correct index.
Displays a list of choose-correct-image questions with thumbnails and highlights the correct image.
frontend/src/components/ConfirmDeleteDia: Confirmation dialog for deleting a game with loading state support.
frontend/src/components/GameCard.tsx: Card component showing a game's thumbnail, name, description, and tags, optionally wrapped in a link.
frontend/src/components/GameEditorDialog: Dialog for editing existing game metadata including name, description, icon, colors, and tags.
frontend/src/components/MatchWordToImage: Interactive game that shows an image and shuffled word options, tracks progress, and handles answer feedback.
Dialog for creating a match-word-to-image question by uploading one image, entering three options, and selecting the correct one.
Displays a grid of word-to-image questions, loads image blobs into URLs, and highlights correct options.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and caches a backend actor based on user identity and invalidates related queries when it changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity auth context, handling login, stored identities, and auth client setup.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for CRUD operations on games and questions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind layers and theme variables for light and dark modes.
frontend/src/lib/assets.ts: Exports static asset paths such as logo and placeholder images.
frontend/src/lib/externalBlob.ts: Converts ExternalBlob objects to image URLs, creates blobs from files, and provides a cleanup-friendly hook.
frontend/src/lib/gameConstants.ts: Defines predefined game metadata, IDs, and utilities for merging backend data with defaults.
frontend/src/lib/shuffle.ts: Implements Fisher‑Yates array shuffling and option shuffling while tracking the correct index.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Initializes the React app with QueryClient and Internet Identity providers.
frontend/src/pages/GameLaunchPage.tsx: Launches a game by ID, loads the correct question set based on game type, and renders the appropriate game component or error/loading states.
frontend/src/pages/GameManagerPage.tsx: Provides an admin interface to view and edit questions for both game types, with tabbed navigation and editor dialogs.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Displays the list of playable games by merging backend and predefined games, handling loading and error states.
frontend/src/types/chooseCorrectImage.ts: Re-exports the ChooseCorrectImageQuestion type and provides a helper to convert bigint correct-image indexes to numbers.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration defining theme extensions, colors, animations, and plugins used across the frontend.
project_state.json: Project metadata describing the current game features, pending requests, and overall project state.
